name: fusionpanda-master
description: FusionPanda Master — production-grade idle fusion RPG. Cyber-neon panda collection, fusion lab, codex, arena & daily challenges. Fully offline PWA.

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:html && npm test
scripts.test: node tests/build.test.cjs && node tests/reward-gate.test.cjs && node tests/game-core.test.cjs
scripts.lint: echo 'Vanilla JS - consider ESLint + TypeScript migration in next phase'
